lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What question did the expert in God’s law ask Jesus?
answers: What is the most important commandment?
How many commands are there in the Bible?

questions.text: What did Jesus say was the most important commandment?
answers: Love God with all your heart, soul, mind, and strength

questions.text: What does the first great commandment teach us to do?
answers: Love God with everything and more than anything
Love God as much as you love yourself
Love God with half of your heart, soul, mind, and strength

questions.text: What did Jesus say was the second most important commandment?
What is another way to say the second great commandment?
answers: Do to others what you would have them do to you
Love your friends and hate your enemies
Be nice to those who are nice to you

questions.text: Jesus said all of God’s commands are based on… what?
answers: What human beings think are right

questions.text: How are God’s commands like a thermometer?
answers: They show us that we are sick with sin
We're supposed to put them in our mouth
They can save us from sin
They keep us from getting sick

questions.text: If God’s law isn't the cure for sin, what is?
What did Jesus do to cure us from our sins?
answers: He died on the cross for our sins and rose from the dead
He punched the devil in the nose
